summary: Registration validation and RewardLoader implementation VERIFIED. All backend validation tests pass (8/8). Frontend shows clear English error messages for duplicate mobile, missing fields, and weak PIN.

POST /api/auth/register/simple - PIN 111.details: Returns 400 'PIN cannot be all same digits (e.g., 111111)'

Frontend - duplicate mobile inline error.details: Shows 'This mobile number is already registered. Please login instead.' under mobile field with AlertCircle icon

Frontend - missing mobile inline error.details: Shows 'Mobile number is required' under mobile field

Frontend - weak PIN validation.details: Shows 'PIN cannot be sequential numbers' with 'Clear and try again' link

Setup.js uses RewardLoader.details: Line 4: import RewardLoader, Line 89: <RewardLoader message='Checking system setup...' />

NetworkTreeAdvanced.js uses RewardLoader.details: Line 4: import RewardLoader, Line 369: <RewardLoader message='Loading network...' />

critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.py (lines 157-167): Mobile validation is now REQUIRED with proper error messages
Backend auth.py (lines 148-149): Weak PIN check for all same digits implemented
Frontend RegisterSimple.js (lines 165-195): catch block correctly maps backend errors to field-level errors
Frontend shows clear English messages: 'This mobile number is already registered. Please login instead.'
RewardLoader component correctly used in Setup.js and NetworkTreeAdvanced.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration validation fully implemented. Backend requires mobile (was optional before). Frontend shows field-level errors with clear English messages. RewardLoader (PRC coin animation) now used in Setup.js and NetworkTreeAdvanced.js in addition to previously verified pages (Profile, BankRedeem, Referrals, Subscription).

error_mapping.mobile number already registered: This mobile number is already registered. Please login instead.
error_mapping.mobile number must be: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number.
error_mapping.email already registered: This email is already registered. Please login instead.
error_mapping.pin cannot be all same: PIN cannot be all same digits (e.g., 111111).
error_mapping.full name: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
